check_interval_minutes.description: How often the alert is evaluated, in minutes.

cooldown_minutes.description: Minutes to wait after firing before sending another notification.

datapoints_to_alarm.description: How many periods must breach to fire (N in N-of-M).

date_from.description: Relative date string for how far back to simulate (e.g. '-24h', '-7d', '-30d').

evaluation_periods.description: Total check periods in the N-of-M evaluation window (M).

filters.description: Filter criteria — same format as LogsAlertConfiguration.filters.

key.description: The key should be the flag ID

operator.description: Only flag_evaluates_to operator is allowed for flag dependencies

value.description: The value can be true, false, or a variant name

threshold_operator.description:
Whether the alert fires when the count is above or below the threshold.

* `above` - Above
* `below` - Below

window_minutes.description: Window size in minutes — determines bucket interval.
